docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE: $40.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONTOYA, TONATIUH AS TO DEFENDANT ONAGBESAN, ALEXANDREA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,940.00 FILED BY MONTOYA, TONATIUH AS TO DEFENDANT ONAGBESAN, ALEXANDREA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-25-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
